dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9289 IH: Keep Public Funds in Public Schools Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Moore of Wisconsin (for herself, Ms. Bonamici, Mr. Frost, Mrs. Grijalva, Mr. Pocan, Mr. Thompson of California, Mr. Doggett, Mr. Larson of Connecticut, Mr. Davis of Illinois, Ms. Sewell, Ms. DelBene, Ms. Chu, Mr. Beyer, Mr. Scott of Virginia, Ms. Ansari, Ms. Brownley, Ms. Budzinski, Ms. Bynum, Mr. Carson, Mr. Casar, Ms. Castor of Florida, Ms. Clarke of New York, Mr. Cleaver, Mr. Clyburn, Mr. Cohen, Ms. Craig, Ms. DeGette, Ms. DeLauro, Mr. DeSaulnier, Ms. Dexter, Mrs. Dingell, Ms. Escobar, Mr. Figures, Mrs. Foushee, Mr. Garamendi, Mr. García of Illinois, Ms. Garcia of Texas, Mrs. Hayes, Ms. Norton, Mr. Huffman, Mr. Ivey, Mr. Jackson of Illinois, Ms. Jayapal, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Ms. Kelly of Illinois, Mr. Khanna, Mr. Krishnamoorthi, Ms. Lee of Pennsylvania, Mr. Mannion, Ms. Matsui, Mrs. McBath, Ms. McBride, Ms. McCollum, Mr. McGovern, Mrs. McIver, Mr. Menefee, Ms. Omar, Ms. Pingree, Mr. Quigley, Mr. Raskin, Ms. Salinas, Ms. Scanlon, Ms. Schakowsky, Ms. Simon, Mr. Stanton, Mr. Takano, Mr. Thompson of Mississippi, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Tokuda, Mr. Tonko, Ms. Underwood, Ms. Wasserman Schultz, Ms. Williams of Georgia, Ms. Wilson of Florida, Ms. Sánchez, and Mr. Moulton) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to repeal the tax credit for contributions of individuals to scholarship granting organizations, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Keep Public Funds in Public Schools Act of 2026.

section.header: Repeal of tax credit for contributions to scholarship granting organizations

paragraph.text: Subpart A of part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking section 25F.

subparagraph.text: Section 25(e)(1)(C) of such Code is amended by striking 25D, and 25F and inserting and 25D.
The table of sections for subpart A of part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1 of such Code is amended by striking the item relating to section 25F.

paragraph.text: Part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking section 139K.
The table of sections for part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of such Code is amended by striking the item relating to section 139K.
Except as otherwise provided in this subsection, the amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years ending after December 31, 2026.
The amendments made by subsection (b) shall apply to amounts received after December 31, 2026, in taxable years ending after such date.
